step_by_step_thinking: I concur with the assessment provided by agent1. Topical steroids excel in treating eczematous dermatitis because they have potent anti-inflammatory effects that alleviate both immediate symptoms like redness and swelling, as well as address the chronic nature often seen in this condition through modulating the immune system's activity. This makes them particularly suitable for long-term management without significant systemic side-effects compared to oral alternatives.
